macro_slots.title: KobiiCraft Core Files — Cursor
macro_slots.label_vs_folder_note: Cursor window title is 'KobiiCraft Core Files' but on-disk folder is 'KobiiCraft Workspace'. Cursor labels its windows by workspace name (a Cursor setting) which can differ from the folder basename.

per_window_layout.tab_bar: Problems · Output · Terminal · Ports · Debug Console (top-left)
per_window_layout.right_sidebar: Cursor agent session list ('claude' entries, ~10-15 visible per window)
per_window_layout.bottom_chrome: Cursor status bar + Browser Workbench shortcut
per_window_layout.footer: Windows taskbar with all 5 macro-slot Cursor windows pinned

session_count_assertion.video_evidence: 10-15 'claude' entries visible in right sidebar of active window (claude-power-pack); not extrapolatable to 45 across all 5 windows from these 2 frames alone
session_count_assertion.next_action: Owner confirms total session count OR I extract 9 frames spanning all 5 windows

topology_invariants: Exactly 5 macro slots (Cursor windows). Adding a 6th invalidates the layout.
Macro-slot order in taskbar must match: InfinityOps -> KobiiCraft Core Files -> CursorProjects -> LuckyFly -> claude-power-pack.
Each window shows the claude-code agent terminal as primary pane.
Right sidebar lists active claude agent sessions for that workspace.
out_of_scope_for_this_capture: Pane sub-layouts inside each window (would need per-window screenshots)
Active terminal content (mutates per session; not part of topology)
Cross-window agent dispatch patterns (Lazarus-level concern, separate doc)
